target_missing: Please enter a threshold to proceed
no_alerts_found: No alerts found during the evaluation. This happens when rule condition is unsatisfied. You may adjust the rule threshold and retry.
channel_select_tooltip: Leave empty to send this alert on all the configured channels
preview_chart_unexpected_error: An unexpeced error occurred updating the chart, please check your query.
placeholder_label_key_pair: Click here to enter a label (key value pairs)
remove_label_confirm: This action will remove all the labels. Do you want to proceed?
threshold_alert_desc: An alert is triggered whenever a metric deviates from an expected threshold.
anomaly_detection_alert_desc: An alert is triggered whenever a metric deviates from an expected pattern.
metric_query_max_limit: Can not create query. You can create maximum of 5 queries
confirm_save_content_part2: query will be saved. Press OK to confirm.
unexpected_error: Sorry, an unexpected error occurred. Please contact your admin
condition_required: at least one metric condition is required
promql_required: promql expression is required when query format is set to PromQL
chquery_required: query is required when query format is set to ClickHouse
text_condition1_anomaly: Send notification when the observed value for
user_guide_qb_step1a: Choose a metric which you want to create an alert on
user_guide_qb_step1b: Filter it based on WHERE field or GROUPBY if needed
user_guide_qb_step1c: Apply an aggregatiion function like COUNT, SUM, etc. or choose NOOP to plot the raw metric
user_guide_qb_step1d: Create a formula based on Queries if needed
user_guide_qb_step2a: Select the evaluation interval, threshold type and whether you want to alert above/below a value
user_guide_qb_step3a: Set alert severity, name and descriptions
user_guide_qb_step3b: Add tags to the alert in the Label field if needed
user_guide_pql_step1a: Write a PromQL query for the metric
user_guide_pql_step1b: Format the legends based on labels you want to highlight
user_guide_pql_step2a: Select the threshold type and whether you want to alert above/below a value
user_guide_pql_step3a: Set alert severity, name and descriptions
user_guide_pql_step3b: Add tags to the alert in the Label field if needed
user_guide_ch_step1a: Write a Clickhouse query for alert evaluation. Follow <0>this tutorial</0> to learn about query format and supported vars.
user_guide_ch_step1b: Format the legends based on labels you want to highlight in the preview chart
user_guide_ch_step2a: Select the threshold type and whether you want to alert above/below a value
user_guide_ch_step3a: Set alert severity, name and descriptions
user_guide_ch_step3b: Add tags to the alert in the Label field if needed
user_tooltip_more_help: More details on how to create alerts
choose_alert_type: Choose a type for the alert
metric_based_alert_desc: Send a notification when a condition occurs in the metric data.
anomaly_based_alert_desc: Send a notification when a condition occurs in the metric data.
log_based_alert_desc: Send a notification when a condition occurs in the logs data.
traces_based_alert_desc: Send a notification when a condition occurs in the traces data.
exceptions_based_alert_desc: Send a notification when a condition occurs in the exceptions data.
text_alert_on_absent: Send a notification if data is missing for
text_require_min_points: Run alert evaluation only when there are minimum of
text_num_points: data points in each result group
search_placeholder: Search by Alert Name, Severity and Labels
sample_alert_link: Click here to see how to create a sample alert.
v2_sisam_routing_desc: Recommended labels for APM routing, PM briefing, and vendor coordination. Values must match project_ids, environments, and owner_team fields in SOP Documents.
v2_all_labels_present: All recommended SI/SM labels are present
v2_sop_binding_desc: Optional metadata used for direct SOP binding, preview links, and cockpit warnings.
v2_sop_preview_desc: Contract scaffold for resolving SOP metadata before a live source connector is enabled.
v2_sop_preview_error: Unable to preview SOP source metadata.
v2_sop_ready_for_review: SOP metadata is ready for PM handoff review.
v2_sop_add_metadata: Add SOP identity or source metadata before pilot use.
v2_pm_briefing_desc: Optional annotations shown on alert details for SI/SM PM triage.
v2_ai_evidence_desc: Optional annotations shown on alert details and copied into the PM handoff.
v2_alert_data_stops_desc: Send notification if no data is received for a specified time period.
v2_alert_data_stops_tooltip: Useful for monitoring data pipelines or services that should continuously send data. For example, alert if no logs are received for 10 minutes
v2_min_data_required_desc: Only trigger alert when there are enough data points to make a reliable decision.
v2_min_data_required_tooltip: Prevents false alarms when there's insufficient data. For example, require at least 5 data points before checking if CPU usage is above 80%.
v2_how_often_check_tooltip: Controls how frequently the alert evaluates your conditions. For most alerts, 1-5 minutes is sufficient.
v2_how_often_check_desc: How frequently this alert checks your data. Default: Every 1 minute
v2_repeat_notifications_desc: Send periodic notifications while the alert condition remains active.
v2_repeat_notifications_tooltip: Continue sending periodic notifications while the alert condition persists. Useful for ensuring critical alerts aren't missed during long-running incidents. Configure how often to repeat and under what conditions.
v2_notification_message_tooltip: Customize the message content sent in alert notifications. Variables like $incident.impact_summary, $incident.next_action, $incident.service_name, and $incident.sop_id are replaced when the alert fires.
v2_notification_message_desc: Custom message content for alert notifications. Leave empty to use the channel's default template. Fill in only when this rule needs different content.
v2_incident_template_vars_desc: Use these DS-APM variables to include PM briefing, SI/SM routing, and SOP binding context in notifications.
v2_pm_sisam_hint: PM/SI-SM context is available with variables like
v2_unknown_vars_hint: Use the Variables list to pick a supported $incident.* field.
v2_preview_error_msg: Unable to preview this notification message.
v2_group_alerts_by_tooltip: Group similar alerts together to reduce notification volume. Leave empty to combine all matching alerts into one notification without grouping.
v2_group_alerts_by_desc: Combine alerts with the same field values into a single notification.
v2_enable_grouping_tooltip: Add 'Group by' fields to your query to enable alert grouping
v2_all_grouping_disabled: All = grouping of alerts is disabled
v2_alerts_grouped: Alerts with same {{fields}} will be grouped
v2_empty_grouping: Empty = all matching alerts combined into one notification
v2_validation_threshold_label_required: Please enter a label for each threshold
v2_validation_channel_required: Please select at least one channel for each threshold or enable routing policies
v2_ask_admin: Please ask your admin to create one.
v2_routing_policies_banner: Use Routing Policies for dynamic routing
rc_description: Copy-ready incident packet for PM, operator, vendor, and customer updates.
